evidence_policy: Operator decisions authorize identity resolution and review disposition but remain separate from archive evidence.

items.operator_note: SW4GNER/SW4GN3R variants resolve to Michael Wagner.
items.subject: Michael Wagner

items.operator_note: Santi was Head of Star Atlas Community.
items.subject: Santi

items.operator_note: Jose, known as ZeSKK, created and expanded Star Atlas lore.
items.subject: Jose / ZeSKK

items.operator_note: Dom was a Star Atlas team member responsible for community events.
items.subject: Dom / DominicVain

items.operator_note: Star Atlas moderator; retain the archive-backed Community Helper of the Year award.
items.subject: Jindo

items.operator_note: SuhailDebar handle variants resolve to Suhail.
items.subject: Suhail

items.operator_note: Operator approved promotion.
items.subject: Funcracker

items.operator_note: Aephia and AEP are the same guild; Funcracker and Prometheus are co-founders.
items.subject: Aephia

items.operator_note: BULK is an armed-freighting guild founded and currently led by Eoganacht.
items.subject: BULK

items.operator_note: Bodhi/Bodhitree resolve to Bohdi; AEP member, major Ustur player, and mega-whale. Community-conflict claims remain operator-sourced.
items.subject: Bohdi

items.operator_note: Exclude deleted-user tags and identity references; retain messages only as context for other public users.
items.subject: Deleted User

items.operator_note: Guild founded by Witticus, ReyVeezy, and FancyHat; preserve supplied show, Discord succession, departure, and membership history as operator context pending dates.
items.subject: Rome

items.operator_note: Hakmer is associated with COEX, shorthand for the Turkish-based Coexist guild.
items.subject: Hakmer / Coexist

items.operator_note: Lerinor is an AEP member.
items.subject: Lerinor

items.operator_note: EC means Eclypse; retain the archive-backed Community Member of the Year award.
items.subject: Neo_AArmstrong / Eclypse

items.operator_note: Long-standing Star Atlas content creator; supplied identity and role details confirmed.
items.subject: Atlas Theory

items.operator_note: Chri.z resolves to Chris Kaczmarczyk-Smith, Head of Star Atlas Game Economy. Attributed game-economy statements are authoritative first-party institutional evidence; lifecycle and temporal wording remain controlling.
items.subject: Chris Kaczmarczyk-Smith / Chri.z

items.operator_note: Use DrumCarlos; Polaris Fuel seeks to reduce fuel prices; DAO Council service confirmed.
items.subject: DrumCarlos / Polaris Fuel

items.operator_note: The Club is an alias for one of the original Star Atlas guilds.
items.subject: The Club Guild

items.operator_note: Exclude from promotion review.

items.operator_note: Co-founder of Aephia/AEP.

items.operator_note: Exclude from promotion review.
items.subject: inti

items.subject: The Star Atlas AI App

items.operator_note: Founder of Deep Profits [DEEP]; later hired by Star Atlas and now Lead Project Manager and Developer.
items.subject: Xcode

items.operator_note: YouTube creator beyondthehorizon2620; Content Creator of the Year; currently inactive after copyright restrictions.
items.subject: BTH 2620

items.operator_note: Creator of EveEye, now Ryden Systems.

items.operator_note: Star Atlas music content creator, former Star Atlas moderator, and member of Aephia/AEP.
items.subject: Shaddix

items.operator_note: Star Atlas gameplay engineer.
items.subject: MagicPuncher

items.operator_note: The Vanguard is a guild whose display tag is V followed by uppercase Greek lambda: VΛ.
items.subject: The Vanguard

items.operator_note: Agent_Solace is a confirmed display-name alias; repository Discord-derived URL records show the VΛ-tagged form.
items.subject: Agent Solace

items.operator_note: Identity remains unknown without further context; do not merge the observed Michael handle with Michael Wagner.
items.subject: Michael

items.operator_note: Use Virtuwul as the preferred spelling; legacy Virtuwaal and Virtuwuul spellings resolve to the same person. Member of Rome and owner of the Titan-class Rainbow Phi.
items.subject: Virtuwul

items.operator_note: MetaVerse Explorer was a member of Aephia/AEP.
items.subject: MetaVerse Explorer

items.operator_note: Dark Matter was a guild/DAC aligned with the Ustur faction.
items.subject: Dark Matter

items.operator_note: The EMP display tag remains unresolved.
items.subject: EMP

items.operator_note: A standalone uppercase Greek lambda attached to a handle usually indicates association with the Agora guild; it does not establish membership by itself.
items.subject: Λ / Agora

items.operator_note: Exact dates are unknown and are low priority for archive ingestion; retain the undated sequence as operator context.
items.subject: Rome guild chronology dates

items.operator_note: The collection tool was not configured for a Discord announcement channel, so the file title duplicated the first collected message title and is not a native channel name.
items.subject: Imported announcements export title

items.operator_note: Treat March 2021 as the canonical beginning of the Star Atlas Discord; no history exists before its formation.
items.subject: Star Atlas Discord beginning

items.operator_note: The operator-supplied Portuguese guild description is preserved as translated context. Agora is a collaborative Star Atlas guild led by SAWYN and Neo_AArmstrong; its supplied public invite is https://discord.gg/69HsqtZ22N.
items.subject: Agora guild profile
